name: Creek Links
address: 4571 New Linden Hill Rd, Wilmington, DE 19808
about: Creek Links is a state-of-the-art indoor golf facility located in Pike Creek, Delaware. The venue is equipped with two Tour TrackMan4 simulators, the same technology used by 90 of the top 100 PGA Tour players, providing detailed ball flight, launch angle, club speed, and spin rate data. The facility operates 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, offering flexible access for members to practice or play regardless of weather conditions. Memberships are available on a monthly, 6-month, or annual basis, and the facility also supports private events with full rentals.
why_golfers_like_it: Tour-level TrackMan4 technology for precise data tracking
24/7 member access for flexible practice schedules
Private climate-controlled bays for focused training
Competitive pricing with no forced random pairings
